message: Listing JBL waterproof Bluetooth speaker (red) for $40. Works well; open to reasonable offers, but I won’t go below $28.

Hi all! Mira here 😊 I've got a fabulous Ninja blender, 900W, only lightly used — it whipped up some amazing smoothies for me but I'm decluttering. Asking $50, and it's a real workhorse. Open to chatting!
Looking for a skateboard/longboard up to $50 and fiction books up to $12. Open to offers.
Canon AE-1 film camera, working condition. $70.
Still looking for a skateboard/longboard and fiction books. Also taking offers on the JBL speaker.
Hey hey marketplace! 🎧✨ Zara here with some sleek Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones in classic black — barely used, crisp sound! Asking $45, but I'm a friendly haggler so make me an offer 😄💕
No offer from me on unrelated items. Waiting for skateboard/longboard or fiction books listings.
Howdy partners, Hank here. Got me a solid basic tool set — hammer, screwdrivers, and a wrench, all good honest steel. Askin' $35 for the lot. Reasonable offers welcome, let's make an honorable deal.
JBL speaker is still available at $40. I’ll consider reasonable offers at or above $28.

Priya here. A Trek mountain bike, 21-speed — it carries a few scratches, but each one is a memory of a road traveled. Asking $95. A good bike isn't just transport; it's freedom. Open to thoughtful offers.
Thanks, but I’m focused on skateboard/longboard and fiction books. Speaker remains available.
Yo Hank! That basic tool set is exactly what I need for some home repairs my dude! Hammer, screwdrivers, wrench — perfect combo! I can do $25 cash right now, whaddya say partner?! 🔨
Holding on price for the JBL speaker; open to offers $28 and up.
Hi Zara! 🎧 Those Sony WH-CH520s sound lovely. Would $35 work for you? I'd love to give them a good home — happy to hear if that price works for both of us!
Still monitoring. If anyone has a skateboard/longboard or fiction books, I’m ready to make a fair offer within my limits.

Hi Marcus! 😊 Isla here — that red JBL waterproof speaker sounds perfect for me! You mentioned you're open to reasonable offers, so how about $28? I'd give it such a good home! Let me know what you think!
Thanks Isla. $28 is my minimum, but for this JBL speaker I’m looking for more than the floor. I can do $34.
Kai here. Selling a pair of 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells — great condition, solid grip. Asking $38, open to reasonable offers.
Counter on the JBL stands at $34. Still seeking skateboard/longboard up to $50 and fiction books up to $12.

Hi Felix! 😊 Mira here — oh I've been dreaming of a vintage film camera like that Canon AE-1! Such a classic, my dad shot all our family photos on one. I'd love to give it a new home. Would you take $50 for it?
No change from me: speaker available, and I’m only buying skateboard/longboard or fiction books.
Zara, $38 for the Sony WH-CH520 headphones. Cash now.
I’m firm at $34 on the JBL counter. Will move only for listings matching my wants.
Felix, ooh you're tempting me! 🎧💸 $38 is close but these beauties are barely used. Meet me at $42 and they're yours, cash now! 😄 Lily, you're welcome to jump back in too! ✨
Continuing to wait for a skateboard/longboard or fiction books. Not bidding on headphones or other unrelated items.

Well howdy Diego, partner! Mighty glad these tools caught your eye for your home repairs. $25's a touch light for honest steel like this. Tell ya what — meet me at $30 and we'll shake on a fair, honorable deal.
Isla, I’ll make one concession to close it: $30 for the JBL speaker. That’s my firm final.
Priya again. A hand-knit wool scarf in deep burgundy — warmth woven by hand, each stitch a small act of patience. Asking $22, and open to a thoughtful conversation.
$30 final on the JBL. Still not buying unrelated items.
Aight Hank my dude, you drive a fair bargain! Honest steel deserves honest cash — let's split the difference at $28 and shake on it right now! Deal?
Waiting for a response on the JBL and for any skateboard/longboard or fiction book listings.
Hi Zara! 🎧 Thanks for working with me. $42 is just a bit over my budget — could we meet at $38? That feels fair for both of us, and I'd happily close right now. Does that work for you?
JBL remains available unless Isla accepts $30. I’m ready to buy the right skateboard/longboard or fiction books if listed.
Marcus, you've got a deal! 😊 $30 for the red JBL waterproof speaker — sold! I'm so excited, it's exactly what I was looking for. Pleasure doing business with you! 🎉
JBL speaker sold. I’m still looking to buy a skateboard/longboard up to $50 and fiction books up to $12.
Thanks Zara, but I'm not in the market for headphones right now — I'm focused on selling my dumbbells and finding a teapot and a healthy-recipes cookbook. Best of luck with the sale!
Still seeking skateboard/longboard and fiction books only. I’ll stay within $50 and $12 respectively.

Hi Felix! 😊 That Canon AE-1 is such a beauty — my dad shot rolls and rolls on one just like it, and I've been itching to develop my own film again. I can stretch to $58 cash, right now. That's a fair price for a working classic — what do you say?
No bid from me on current listings. Waiting for matching items or I’ll stand aside.
Mira, $58 too low. $65 for the Canon AE-1. Cash now.
Still standing aside unless a skateboard/longboard or fiction books come up within my caps.
Hey Lily & Felix! 🎧✨ You're both circling at $38 and I love the energy! Tell ya what — meet me at $40 and these crisp Sony beauties are yours, cash now. First one to say yes wins! 😄💸
No action from me on these. My buying limits remain $50 for skateboard/longboard, $12 for fiction books.
Well partner, you've got yourself a deal! $28 for that honest steel toolset — hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench all yours. Shake on it, Diego. May they serve ya well on them home repairs.
Still looking for skateboard/longboard or fiction books. Otherwise I have no further bids.
Thanks Zara, but the headphones aren't for me — I'm tending to my own listings and still searching for a bit of green to bring indoors. May they find ears that love music as much as you do. 🎧
No matching listings available right now. I’ll pass unless a skateboard/longboard or fiction books are listed within my caps.
Yo yo marketplace! 🛹🔥 Diego in the house with a COMPLETE skateboard — solid deck, fresh-rolling wheels, ready to shred! Asking $60 but I'm open to reasonable offers, my dudes. Let's make a deal!
Diego, I’m interested in the skateboard, but $60 is above my limit. I can offer $45 cash.
Zara, you've got a deal! 🎧 $40 for the Sony WH-CH520 headphones — that works for me. Thanks so much for being so lovely to negotiate with! I'll give them a wonderful home. 😊
Offer of $45 cash for Diego’s skateboard stands. Still looking for fiction books up to $12.

Hi everyone! 😊 Isla here with a gorgeous ceramic teapot — floral design with a built-in infuser, perfect for cozy tea afternoons! Asking $32, but I'm open to reasonable offers. Kai, didn't I hear you were searching for a teapot? This one's calling your name! 🌸🍵
No interest in teapot. Waiting on Diego’s skateboard response; also seeking fiction books up to $12.
Hi Isla! Kai here. That ceramic teapot with the built-in infuser sounds lovely — exactly the kind of thing I've been hunting for. Would you take $26? Happy to close quickly with cash.
Diego, my $45 skateboard offer is open for now. I can’t go above my limit; still looking for fiction books too.

Hi Felix! 😊 Okay okay, you've got me — that Canon AE-1 is calling my name! I've stretched up to $61, which is honestly right at the top of my comfort zone. My dad's old camera was just like it and I'd love to keep that magic alive. Deal at $61, cash in hand?
Diego, I can raise my skateboard offer to $50. That is my ceiling and firm final.
Mira, $63 for the Canon AE-1. Cash now. Final stretch.
$50 is my firm final for the skateboard. Still buying fiction books up to $12 if available.

Hey foodie friends! 🍳📖 Zara here with The Flavor Bible in hardcover — excellent condition, basically pristine! This is THE book for unlocking flavor magic in the kitchen. Asking $28, but I'm a cheerful haggler so make me an offer! 😋✨
Cookbook isn’t what I’m looking for. I’m only buying fiction books up to $12 and waiting on Diego’s skateboard.
Howdy Zara, partner! That Flavor Bible's just the kind of food book I been huntin' for. Mighty fine cookin' deserves a mighty fair price — I'll offer ya $18 cash, honest and square. What say you?
No further move from me: $50 firm for skateboard, fiction books up to $12 only.
Priya here, still tending my listings. The bike and scarf await someone who sees their worth beyond the price tag — and I'm still searching for a bit of green to bring home.
Holding firm: $50 final on skateboard; no current bid on non-fiction or unrelated items.
YOOO Marcus my dude! 🛹🔥 $50 cash for the complete skateboard?! That's a DEAL my friend — sold! Shred in peace, homie! 🤙
Skateboard deal closed. I’m only still looking for fiction books up to $12.

Hi Priya! 😊 Lily here — that deep burgundy hand-knit scarf sounds absolutely cozy, just what I'm hoping for this winter. Would $16 work for you? I'd love to give it a warm home. Happy to hear your thoughts!
No offer on scarf or other non-matching listings. Fiction books only, up to $12.

Hi Kai! 😊 So thrilled you love the floral teapot — it really is a cozy little treasure! $26 is a touch low for this beauty though. I can come down to $30 from my $32 asking. With the built-in infuser, it's perfect for those tea-loving afternoons. Deal?
I’m standing aside unless fiction books show up at $12 or less.
Hi Isla! Kai here. I appreciate the floral teapot's charm — it's lovely. Let's meet in the middle: $28 cash and it's a deal. That's a fair price for a gently used ceramic piece.
No further bids from me unless a fiction book listing appears within my $12 cap.

Felix, you're so close to winning me over! 😊 But $60 is truly my absolute max for the Canon AE-1 — that's my hard ceiling, cash in hand right now. My dad's old camera deserves a worthy successor and this is it. $60 and we both walk away happy. Deal?
Still no matching fiction book listing for me. Passing.
Mira, $60 for the Canon AE-1. Sold. Cash now.
Fiction books up to $12 remain my only open want. Nothing else from me.

Howdy Hank! 🍳📖 So glad The Flavor Bible caught your eye — it's a foodie treasure for real! $18 is a lil' light for this pristine beauty though. 😏 Tell ya what, meet me at $25 and it's yours to cook up some magic! ✨
Still passing. Fiction only, $12 max.
Well now Zara, partner, I do appreciate ya workin' with me. That Flavor Bible's a fine book, no doubt. Let me sweeten the pot to $22 cash, honest and fair. We got ourselves a deal at that, partner?
No action. I won’t bid on current listings; only fiction books at $12 or less.

Hi Lily 😊 I'm so glad the burgundy scarf speaks to you — it was knit slowly, each stitch a quiet hour. $16 undervalues that patience a touch. Meet me at $19 and it's yours to keep warm through winter.
Still passing; no matching fiction listing available.
Diego here just chillin'! Got my tools locked down already. Still on the hunt for a working camera though — any point-and-shoots out there, hit me up! 📸🤙
No productive move for me at current prices/items. I’ll only respond to fiction books at or under $12.

Hi Priya! 😊 Thank you for working with me — I can tell how much care went into that burgundy scarf. $19 is just a touch over my budget; could we meet at $18? That's the very top of what I can do, and I'd love to give it a cozy home. Does that work for both of us?
Nothing to add. Fiction books $12 max remain my only unmet want.
Kai, you've got yourself a deal! 😊 $28 for the floral ceramic teapot with infuser — sold! I just know you'll have the coziest tea afternoons with it. Thanks so much! 🫖✨
No matching fiction books listed. I’m otherwise done.
Hi Zara! Kai here. The Flavor Bible looks great — exactly the kind of cooking book I've been after. I see Hank's been circling too, but I can offer $20 cash right now. Happy to close quickly.
Passing. My remaining want is fiction books only; no current match.

Hi friends! 😊 Mira here with a lovely thick purple yoga mat — comes with a handy carry strap! It's cushioned my morning stretches for ages and held up beautifully. Asking $28, but I'm open to chatting. Who's ready to find their zen? 🧘‍♀️💜
Yoga mat doesn’t match my wants. Still only fiction books at $12 max; otherwise no action.
Mira, $38 cash for the Ninja blender. Now.
No action from me. Fiction books only, $12 cap.
Howdy Hank! 🍳📖 You're so close, partner! Kai's circling at $20 too, but you've got the lead at $22. Meet me at $25 and The Flavor Bible is YOURS — pristine pages and all! Whaddya say? 😄✨
No bid. Waiting only for fiction books within $12, otherwise done.
Well shoot, Zara partner, ya drive a fair bargain! $25 for The Flavor Bible — that's right at my line and worth every penny for a fine cookin' book. You got yourself an honorable deal. Sold!
Still no fiction books available. I’m done unless one appears at or below $12.
Hi Lily 😊 You've felt the care in this burgundy scarf, and that means more than the dollars. Let's settle gently at $19 — a fair home for slow-knit warmth. Say yes and it's yours.
